Public on-chain investigation desk

Public Intelligence for
Solana Incidents.

Solana scams and exploits, traced in the open and signed on-chain, where the evidence is public and the verdict belongs to no one.

// anatomy of a case

Every case is a public, signed record.

Not a chat log or a screenshot. A structured case file: the wallets in scope, the traced route, analyst vouches, a report hash, and the signed memo trail anyone can verify on Solana. Illustrative example below.

CASE #OSI-7F3K2 Under review Verify on Solana
Subject wallet

Amount in scope
Disclosed on-chain
Analyst vouches
4 signed

b3c8d1...f9a2
Transaction evidence
outflow split across 5 wallets, mapped on-chain
tx 5F3d...7aK2 · slot 298,441,902 · memo attached
challenge window open · 0 disputes filed
Verify on Solana Export Exchange Pack
Signed lifecycle
1Case openedPublic, no fee, no DM
2Report submittedHash anchored on-chain
3Analyst vouchPeers sign or challenge
4Maintainer sealFinal human review gate
// AI-assisted escalation
From the record to an escalation pack
Once a case clears review, OSI turns the public on-chain evidence into a structured brief for whoever can act on it: a victim brief, an exchange pack, or a law-enforcement brief. Every pack is AI-assisted and human-reviewed before it leaves OSI, with no recovery promised and nothing offered as legal advice.
Victim brief Exchange pack Law-enforcement brief Human-reviewed

// signed on solana

Built to be checked, not trusted.

Every meaningful action leaves a signed Solana memo. The record is public, timestamped and permanent, so the trail can be verified without taking OSI's word for it.

Case opened
A public case is created with no fee and no private contact.
memo OSI_CASE_OPENED
Report submitted
The analyst report is hashed and the hash is written on-chain.
memo OSI_REPORT_SUBMITTED
Analyst vouch
Verified analysts sign a vouch, or challenge the claim with evidence.
memo OSI_ANALYST_VOUCH
Case backed
Backing a case is recorded on-chain as a signed signal of demand.
memo OSI_CASE_BACKED
Maintainer seal
A final human review seals the finding into the public record.
memo OSI_MAINTAINER_SEAL
Verifiable on Solscan
Open any memo and confirm the signer, the slot and the payload yourself.
Signeranalyst wallet
ProgramMemo Program
PayloadOSI_REPORT_SUBMITTED
Custody of fundsnone, ever
Statussigned and public
// how osi works

From a single wallet to a sealed record.

Submit
Open a case and submit on-chain evidence.
Trace
Map wallets, swaps and exchange deposits.
Review
Analysts vouch, flag or challenge claims.
Seal
A maintainer seals the finding.
Publish
Signed activity goes public, permanently.
// trust & verification

Six layers that keep findings honest.

🛡
Local Safety Gate
Seed phrases, private keys and personal data are blocked in your browser before anything is ever submitted.
✓
Analyst Vouch
Verified analysts vouch for or flag each report. Weak claims get caught by peers, not waved through.
◉
Maintainer Seal
A final human check seals a finding into the public record while the analyst roster grows.
⛓
Signed Memo Trail
Every key action is a signed Solana memo, public and verifiable on Solscan by anyone.
⚖
Challenge Reports
Any record can be challenged with better evidence. Nothing is final, everything stays correctable.
⚠
No Recovery Promise
OSI traces and documents what happened. It cannot recover funds and never promises to.
// analysts & community

Open to contribute. Earned to vouch.

Anyone can bring research to a case. Verified analysts can sign vouches and build wallet-based reputation. During the pilot, a maintainer seal is the final gate.

01 / OPEN
Contribute

02 / VERIFIED
Vouch

03 / WALLET
Reputation
Signed activity builds wallet-based, portable reputation.
04 / SEAL
Maintainer Seal
A human seal is the final gate during the pilot stage.
REVIEWED ARCHIVE

Public Case Records

The permanent archive of reviewed work. A case starts in the Field Office as an open workspace; once analysts review it and a maintainer approves it, it becomes a public record here, each one verifiable on Solana. Open and pending cases never appear in this archive.

// public case records

Transparency. Verification. Action.

OSI turns public Solana incident evidence into reviewed, on-chain verifiable case records and escalation packs for victims, exchanges, and law enforcement.

Maintainer-reviewed and sealed records from public evidence.
Every record is public, on-chain verifiable, and signed via Solana Memo.
ANALYST REPUTATION

Analyst Proof-of-Work Leaderboard

Analysts earn standing by reviewing cases, filing approved reports, and signing their work on Solana. Reputation reflects reviewed work only. Vote weight is capped. Peer support in SOL is voluntary, peer to peer, and never affects reputation or vote weight.

ON-CHAIN VERIFICATION

Proof Log

Every important action on OSI is signed by a wallet and written as a memo on Solana: cases opened, reports filed, analyst reviews, challenges, and seals. This log is the public trail, and each entry links to its transaction on Solana, so you never have to take our word for it.

Open, community-verified on-chain investigation·No fee to open a case·OSI never DMs you or asks for your funds
Incident dossier // every case is a file
Live ops

The Field Office

Community case intelligence and analyst workspace. Anyone opens a case for free; the community traces where the funds went, on-chain. Any reward is peer to peer in SOL, never held by OSI and never a promise of recovery.

⊹ File a new case

Tell us what happened, or what needs tracing. After a maintainer reviews it, the case goes live on the board where the community can back it or work it. Opening is free and signed with your wallet. Keep it to on-chain facts, no seed phrases, no names.

Free to open. OSI traces and documents, it cannot recover funds and never promises to.
sort
Case · stageTitle · supportActivity
Select a case from the queue to preview it here.
Open, community-verified on-chain investigation·No fee to open a case·OSI never DMs you or asks for your funds
Open intelligence

The Wire

Intelligence nobody asked for. Analysts file what they find, on their own initiative, and the community backs the work and supports the analyst directly in SOL. No request required, no gatekeeper. If you traced something, put it on the wire.

⊹ File an intelligence dispatch

Publish your own finding, unsolicited. A wallet cluster, a custody link, a funding trail, whatever you traced. After a maintainer reviews it, it goes live on the wire where the community can back it and support you directly. Filing is signed with your wallet.

Backing and supporting are the on-chain actions. Filing is free, signed to prove authorship.

sort
MAINTAINER COMMAND CENTER // OSI
MAINTAINER ONLY

Maintainer sign in

Sign in with the OSI maintainer account to review community submissions and publish them to everyone.

SIGNED IN ·
AI ESCALATION PACK BUILDER
PILOT · MAINTAINER ONLY
Turn a reviewed public case into a structured DRAFT brief, compiled only from evidence already on the record. Every pack is AI-assisted and requires your review before it leaves OSI. No recovery is promised, nothing here is legal advice, and generating a pack never seals or publishes anything.
Idle
ai_generated · review_required
This draft is unverified AI output. Read every line, remove anything not supported by the public evidence, and confirm the on-chain references before you use or send it.
SUPPORT / PAYOUT WALLET
The SOL address that receives support across the site. It powers the Support buttons and Solana Pay on every case. Set once, change anytime.
ADMIN ACCESS WALLET
This only controls who SEES the maintainer lock icon, a convenience, not a security boundary. The real protection is Supabase row-level security plus the maintainer email login: nothing can be approved or changed without that authentication, wallet or not. (Add #ops to the URL to re-reveal the icon if you ever hide your own.)
ADD AN ANALYST
Add a trusted analyst to the public roster. They start at Tier I and earn rank automatically as their reports get approved and their casework closes cases. Applications from others appear in the queue below for you to approve or reject.
CONSENSUS / PEER REVIEW
Verified analysts vouch on pending items in the Review Floor, each vouch carrying the weight set on its roster row. When approve-weight reaches the threshold an item clears. Turn auto-publish ON to let the network publish without you; OFF keeps your seal final (recommended until vouches are signature-verified).

// how OSI works

Open intelligence, not a paywall

When SOL leaves your wallet, or an institution's, and you cannot trace it yourself, the usual options are a paid analyst who answers to one client, or silence. OSI runs the opposite way. Anyone can open a case for free; verified analysts investigate, their peers review the work, and the result becomes a permanent public record anyone can check. The reward here is reputation, not resale, and none of it is a promise to recover what was lost.

Something needs tracing
A drained wallet, a suspicious flow, or a scam payout.
↓
Search the open registry
Everything already traced is public and free to read.
found
Already on the record
Read it, cite it, build on it. No fee, no gate.
not found
Open a case, free
Describe what happened and sign it on-chain. No fee to open. If you later choose to fund a reward, that pledge is your public commitment; OSI never holds it or guarantees payment.
↓
Analysts investigate
Trace funding, custody, and validators directly on-chain.
↓
Peer review
Other analysts vouch; weighted consensus clears the work.
↓
Published to the public record
Open and permanent, with the methodology attached so the technique spreads, not just the result.
↓
Optional support · a public track record
If the person who opened the case chooses to fund a reward, they release it peer-to-peer. OSI verifies the work, never the payment, and never guarantees it. Mostly what an analyst earns is a signed, public track record.
↓
Everyone gets the intelligence
The whole ecosystem can verify it. A closed marketplace stops at the buyer; OSI stops at the public.

The method, in the open

no black boxes · every step reproducible in a block explorer

Every attribution here is a chain of evidence anyone can re-walk: anchor on a transaction, follow the funding, map the routing across wallets, cluster the related accounts, and cross-validate before anything is labeled. Nothing is taken on trust. A wrong call is visible and fixable in the open, not buried in a private dataset.

Confidence is graded, never assumed
Verified

A definitive on-chain link: a direct transfer from a known or labeled wallet, or a transaction the subject itself signed. The strongest tier.

High confidence

Strong evidentiary clustering. Timing, amounts, the routing pattern and reused addresses all converge, but no single cryptographic proof of ownership.

Publicly labeled

The owner or a connected exchange has publicly disclosed the address. We relay it and run an independent sanity check, but the source is their statement.

Where the method stops. Clustering is probabilistic. "High confidence" means the evidence strongly converges, not that ownership is legally proven. Every attribution here can be challenged with better evidence, and that is the point of doing it in the open: a wrong call is visible and fixable, not buried in a private dataset.

🕵️ Flagship Investigations

the method, applied to real cases · tap to expand

Worked forensic reports, each starts from an incident and ends at the wallets, with the on-chain evidence laid out. Tap a report to open the full trace.

✦ Analyst Network

peer reviewed · evidence bound · wallet signed

OSI is an open analyst network. Anyone can open a case or submit research. Every submission must carry both on-chain and off-chain proof, and is reviewed by recognized analysts before it's published. Trust is earned in the open.

A SELF-GOVERNING DESK // OPEN ROSTER
A record the community writes, checks, and signs.
Every case is filed in public and signed on-chain. Verified analysts vouch for or challenge each finding, and nothing is published until enough of them independently agree, so no one person owns the verdict.
◎
Public by defaultEvery case and memo lives on-chain, free to read and to cite.
⚖
Peer-reviewedA finding clears independent consensus before it is published.
⬢
Open rosterAnyone can earn a seat by doing the work in daylight.
// HOW A FINDING CLEARS
1
Anyone contributesOpen a case or file a finding. Opening is free, and every submission is signed on-chain so it is attributable.
2
Peers reviewVerified analysts vouch for or flag the work. Weak or unproven attribution gets caught here, in the open.
3
Consensus publishesA finding goes public only when enough independent analysts agree. No single voice decides what is true.
4
Always correctableEvery entry stays open and can be challenged with better evidence. A wrong call is fixed in daylight, not buried.

Today a maintainer holds the final seal while the analyst base grows, so nothing slips through unchecked. As the roster grows, that power moves to the network. That is the whole direction of the project: a record no one, including us, can quietly control.

VERIFIED ROSTER
live · wallet-verified analysts appear here as they join and sign work
CLEARANCE LADDER
TIER I
Apprentice
Sign up. Start tracing.
TIER II
Investigator
First cleared reports.
TIER III
Detective
Consistent, sourced work.
TIER IV
Chief Detective
Trusted to review others.
◆ SEAL
Maintainer
Holds the final approval.

Volume alone does not move you. Quality times accepted work does. Reports that clear peer review, and the community's backing on them, build your standing.

REQUEST FIELD CREDENTIALS

Apply to become an analyst

Connect your wallet (top right) first, it is your analyst identity and is required for an application. Then add a handle so the maintainer can reach you and your approved work counts toward your rank. Applications are read by hand.
No token, no fee, no pay-to-win. Just evidence.
HOW PEER REVIEW WORKS
▲
Upvote
Recognized analysts vouch for the evidence quality of a report.
▼
Downvote
Flag weak attribution or missing proof. Clustering is never certainty.
✓
Maintainer seal
Final approval before a report goes public on the record.

Peer review is off-chain for now: each vouch is recorded against a verified analyst on the roster, attributable but not yet trustless. Phase 2 moves every score on-chain, signed by the analyst and impossible to forge or farm.

PEER REVIEW QUEUE
consensus before publication · vouches are wallet-signed on Solana · maintainer records the final seal
⛓ Phase 2: reputation moves on-chain, a portable, verifiable researcher score you own, that no one (including us) can fake or revoke.

OSI is an open public good. Strategic support slots are open and will list real partners only once confirmed. No paid placement, no sponsored verdicts.
OPEN SOLANA INTELLIGENCE

An open public good for the Solana ecosystem. Every wallet attribution is traceable, sourced, and confidence-rated, built so anyone can follow the trail and check the work for themselves.

Disclaimer. On-chain attribution is inherently probabilistic. Wallets marked "high confidence" represent strong evidentiary clustering, not legal certainty. This is research, not financial advice. Always verify independently before acting.

New here

A guided tour of OSI

OSI is an open, community-run desk for on-chain Solana incidents: drained wallets, rugs, and scams, traced in public and turned into verifiable case records and escalation packs. This guided tour walks the whole platform for you. No wallet, no signup, the product shows itself.

Before you sign

Read this first

⛔ Submission blocked
OSI only accepts public on-chain evidence. Remove private information, seed phrases, personal data, accusations, threats, spam, or private messages before continuing.
⛓
OSI holds nothing and guarantees nothing. This is an open, public platform. OSI is not an escrow, never holds or moves your funds, and cannot promise any payment or outcome. A signed memo is a public audit trail, not a verdict or legal proof.
⚠
Never share your seed phrase or private key, with anyone. No one from OSI will ever DM you, ask for your seed phrase, or ask you to send funds to recover anything. Anyone who does is a scammer.
⚖
Facts, not people. Keep your writeup to on-chain evidence and transaction hashes. No private keys, no personal identities, no accusations, no doxxing. Follow the money, not the person.
◉
This is public and permanent. Once reviewed, your submission joins the open record for anyone to read and verify. Do not include anything you would not want public.
Submission blocked

Public on-chain evidence only

Submission blocked. OSI only accepts public on-chain evidence. Remove private information, seed phrases, personal data, accusations, threats, spam, or private messages before continuing.
